args:
set -eu
PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
if ! command -v serena >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Serena is not installed. Run the 'serena-install' skill to install the global serena CLI for this machine." >&2
  exit 1
fi
exec serena start-mcp-server --context codex --project-from-cwd
serena.note: Apple Silicon macOS-only stdio launcher. Requires a globally installed `serena` CLI, typically resolved from `/opt/homebrew/bin` or `$HOME/.local/bin`; after startup, use the `serena-init` skill to activate the current project in Serena.
